relevance_spans.text: and its key insight was that of the learning organization.
His research resulted in the bestselling book, The Fifth Discipline, the art and practice of the learning organisation.
Rather, processes interact with one another to create a series of complex feedback loops.
And Senjay's fifth discipline is systems thinking. Systems thinking is about seeing the organisation
